'''''Valiance''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during and immediately prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], as a member of the reformed [[Defiance Task Force]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-05-03 -->[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
